mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bk_category WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM bk_category WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND name = #{name} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM bk_category WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type} AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bk_category (user_id, name, type, color, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{color}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
